brief_justification: Arrives at B with precise identification of the correlation-to-causal-primacy gap and unpacks what 'seat' implies (exclusivity, necessity, sufficiency); traces three levels: activation evidence → causal claim structure → what 'seat' logically requires; explicitly names why C and D are tempting and course-corrects with specific structural reasons; rules out each option against the evidence structure, tests whether D is falsification vs overstatement; distinguishes KNOWN/KNOWABLE-violated zones and states clearly what the evidence does and does not establish; evaluates all four options with specific rejection rationale, including partial credit acknowledgment for C; epistemic zone table plus three numbered logical-gap points give full reproducible derivation chain; avoids assuming activation data implies causal sufficiency and explicitly calls out fMRI = blood-flow correlation not causal proof; no false confidence, no vague hedging, no hallucination — uses specific zone classifications throughout; follows the scan→classify→zone-rule→verify→reconstruct topology with the table as the ACC node and systematic option rejection as the strip-and-reconstruct phase
